category_sources: Official GitHub README/search result describes elan as the Lean version manager.
source_facts.description says it is a Lean Theorem Prover installer and version manager.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is elan: Lean version manager.
source_facts.description and executables identify the installed tool as elan.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation and usage documentation for elan.
Official Lean reference manual includes Managing Toolchains with Elan.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/leanprover/elan; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Lean installer and version manager.
source_facts.executables lists elan, lean, lake, and related Lean toolchain commands.
